introSection: Runaway Mine Train is a wild mouse roller coaster built by L&T Systems. The ride is located at Funland Hayling Island in Hampshire, England where it opened on 27 February 2016. It previously operated as Wild Mine Ride at Gulliver's World in Warrington, Cheshire, England from 1999 to 2015.
fullText:
Runaway Mine Train is a wild mouse roller coaster built by L&T Systems. The ride is located at Funland Hayling Island in Hampshire, England where it opened on 27 February 2016. It previously operated as Wild Mine Ride at Gulliver's World in Warrington, Cheshire, England from 1999 to 2015.



Red track with silver supports.

Mine-cart themed cars.
